prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约4696→3938→4437，近三年呈先升后降的波动走势；2024年位次明显前移（3938名），2025年回退至4437名，整体在3900–4700名区间 内波动，2025年基准位次约4437名；本省理科计划2023年13人→2024年17人→2025年29人，连续三年扩招；2026年计划增至44人，较2025年扩招约51.7%， 扩招幅度较大，对位次有显著后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名主榜约第28名（2024–2026年），学校层次高、综合实力强， 对考生有持续吸引力；近年声誉整体偏中性，2021年曾因校园安全事件受关注，2024年有投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平台关注度中 等；未见明显投档断档记录；化学工程与技术A+（全国顶尖）、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A等，工科实力突出；盘锦校区招生专业以化工、生物、经济类为主，与主校区优势学科关联紧密。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 能源化学工程（化工A+）对应专业热度一般观望；经济学类社会热度分化观 望；生物科学类/生物信息学属生化环材大类，社会热度明显劝退；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人（含不确定标记），较2025年理科约5.25万人大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，非本省高校；新疆考生出省就读意愿较强，对东北地区高校接受度一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4437名、2026年计划大幅扩招51.7%（供需弹性主值约5814名）、本省考生规模显著增长（竞争加剧）及学校声誉偏中性等因素 ，在供需弹性主值基础上小幅上修；预测2026年理科最低位次约5874名，区间5374–6374名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 经济学类（电子商务、经济学）
- 能源化学工程（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物科学类（生物信息学、生物科学）
- 海洋技术
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 智能海洋装备
- 生物信息学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5874名，区间5374–6374名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<5374名）可重点冲经济学类和能源化学工程等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>6374名）建议以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum science rankings were approximately 4696 → 3938 → 4437, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising then falling in recent three years; in 2024, the ranking significantly moved forward (3938th), and in 2025 it retreated to 4437th, overall fluctuating within the range of 3900–4700; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4437th; the provincial science enrollment plan was 13 in 2023 → 17 in 2024 → 29 in 2025, expanding for three consecutive years; the 2026 plan increases to 44, an expansion of about 51.7% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, exerting significant downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 28th in the main list of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings (2024–2026), with a high school level and strong comprehensive strength, continuously attractive to examinees; recent reputation is generally neutral; in 2021, it attracted attention due to a campus safety incident; in 2024, there were abnormal signals in admission cutoffs; Douyin popularity ranking 55th (relatively hot), with moderate attention on short video platforms; no obvious record of admission cutoff gaps; Chemical Engineering and Technology A+ (top in the country), Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, etc., with outstanding engineering strength; Panjin Campus offers majors mainly in chemical engineering, biology, and economics, closely related to the advantageous disciplines of the main campus.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Energy Chemical Engineering (Chemical Engineering A+) corresponds to generally wait-and-see popularity; Economics category has socially differentiated wait-and-see popularity; Biological Sciences/Bioinformatics belong to the broad category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, with obvious social discouragement; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 238,000 (including uncertain marks), a significant increase compared to about 52,500 science examinees in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, not a local university; Xinjiang examinees have a strong willingness to study outside the province, with average acceptance of universities in Northeast China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4437th, the significant 51.7% expansion of the 2026 plan (supply-demand elasticity main value approximately 5814th), the notable increase in the number of examinees in the province (intensified competition), and the generally neutral school reputation, a slight upward revision is made on the basis of the supply-demand elasticity main value; the predicted 2026 science minimum ranking is approximately 5874th, with a range of 5374–6374th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Economics (E-commerce, Economics)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (including Energy Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Biological Sciences (Bioinformatics, Biological Sciences)
- Marine Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Intelligent Marine Equipment
- Bioinformatics
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 5874th, range 5374–6374th. If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5374th), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Economics and Energy Chemical Engineering; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>6374th), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety.
